description: Optional mosaic-tile preview overrides. Mosaic tiles are composite blocks that combine several elements/components to represent realistic product slices.

mosaicTiles.label: Feature Spotlight Tile
mosaicTiles.intent: Marketing highlight with supporting trust cues.

mosaicTiles.label: KPI Insight Tile
mosaicTiles.intent: Dashboard summary tile with trend and status context.

mosaicTiles.label: Commerce Product Highlight Tile
mosaicTiles.intent: Product tile combining content, pricing, and purchase CTA.
